briefdescription.para: Secure client instance used for XilSecure IPI operations.
SHA3 digest output buffer aligned to 64 bytes and placed in .data.Sha3Hash section.

detaileddescription.para: The attributes ensure alignment and linker section placement for secure hash operations.

briefdescription.para: Buffer holding trailing hash bytes for chunked verification.
Hash Block authentication certificate parameters aligned to 64 bytes.
Boot Header Hash Block 0 storage aligned to 64 bytes and placed in .data.HashBlock0 section.
Authenticated hash block storage aligned to 64 bytes and placed in .data.HashBlock section.
This function sends IPI request to provides PDI execution.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the client instance.
Boot Mode values, DDR, PCIe.
64bit PDI address located in the Source.
Used to store the plm error status.

briefdescription.para: This function sends IPI request to Load image.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the client instance.
Node id of ddr copied image.
To verify with the FuncID of the image copied to DDR.

briefdescription.para: This function sends IPI request to get image information.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the client instance.
Node id of ddr copied image.
Pointer to the structure XLoader_ImageInfo which is used to store the image information.

briefdescription.para: This function sends IPI request to gets ImageInfo Table.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the client instance.
Buffer address to copy the ImageInfo.
Maximum size requires in bytes.
To get the number of entries returned.

listitem.para: Typically be Continue[31 bit] set to 0, In case the first call indicated that more entries are available then this can be set to 1 present we are not supporting more entries , So returning XST_FAILURE if continue parameter is 1.

memberdef.argsstring: (XLoader_ClientInstance *InstancePtr, u64 PdiSrcAddr, u64 DestBuffAddr, u32 DestBuffSize)
memberdef.name: XLoader_ExtractMetaheader

briefdescription.para: This function sends IPI request to Extract meta header.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the client instance.
Address of the pdi.
Address to export the pdi.
size of the destination buffer in bytes.

memberdef.argsstring: (XLoader_ClientInstance *InstancePtr, XLoader_PdiSrc BootMode, XLoader_FlashType Type, u32 ImageLocation)
memberdef.name: XLoader_UpdateMultiboot

briefdescription.para: This function sends IPI request to update multiboot.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the client instance.
Pdi boot source
Flash type
Location of Image in the boot device.

memberdef.argsstring: (XLoader_ClientInstance *InstancePtr, u32 PdiId, const u64 PdiAddr, u32 PdiSize)
memberdef.name: XLoader_AddImageStorePdi

briefdescription.para: This function sends IPI request to add Image store pdi.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the client instance.
Id of the pdi.
Address to store Image store pdi's maintained by PLM.
Size of pdi in words.

briefdescription.para: This function sends IPI request to remove Image store pdi.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the client instance.
Id of the PDI to be removed from Image Store.

briefdescription.para: This function sends IPI request to get ATF Handoff parameters.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the client instance (Input).
Address to store the handoff parameter information (Input).
Maximum number of bytes that can be stored in the buffer (Input).
To get the size of the buffer in bytes (Output).

briefdescription.para: This function sends IPI request to read selective frames from configuration memory.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the client instance
Pointer to structure which contains parameters of CFI selective readback command

inbodydescription.para: Include SLR index in API ID

briefdescription.para: Adds the SLR Index.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to instance XLoader_ClientInstance
- SLR index number

simplesect.para:
- XST_SUCCESS - On valid input SlrIndex.
XST_FAILURE - On non valid input SlrIndex

briefdescription.para: This function sends IPI request to get optional data from the PDI available in DDR or Image Store.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the client instance.
Pointer to XLoader_OptionalDataInfo structure
Address of the output buffer wheren optional data shall be copied
Size of destination buffer in bytes

memberdef.argsstring: (XLoader_ClientInstance *InstancePtr, u32 *PayloadBuf, u32 PayloadLen, u32 *ResponseBuf, u32 ResponseLen)
memberdef.name: XLoader_SendRequest

briefdescription.para: This function sends request to PLM through either SMC or IPI mailbox based on the execution environment.

detaileddescription.para: For EL1 non-secure AArch64 applications, SMC is used. For other environments, IPI mailbox is used.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the client instance
Pointer to the payload message
Length of the payload message
Pointer to store response values (can be NULL)
Length of the response buffer (can be 0 if ResponseBuf is NULL)

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS If the request is successful
XST_FAILURE If there is a failure
XST_INVALID_PARAM If input parameters are invalid

inbodydescription.para: Validate mailbox pointer for IPI communication
Cap ResponseLen: the mailbox shift below consumes Response[0], leaving RESPONSE_ARG_CNT - 1 data slots reachable via Response[Idx + 1U].

Copy IPI response data from InstancePtr->Response[] into caller's ResponseBuf. Skip Response[0] (PLM exec status, returned via Status) so ResponseBuf[0] holds the first data word, matching the SMC path layout.

briefdescription.para: This function sends IPI request to the target module and gets the response from it.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the client instance.
Pointer to the payload message.
Length of the message.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS - If the IPI send and receive is successful.
XST_FAILURE - If there is a failure.

simplesect.para: Payload consists of API id and call arguments to be written in IPI buffer.

inbodydescription.para: Send IPI CDO to PLM. Return XST_FAILURE if sending data failed
- Wait for IPI response from PLM with a default timeout of 2 seconds. If the timeout exceeds then error is returned otherwise it returns the status of the IPI response.

briefdescription.para: This function sets the instance of mailbox.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the client instance.
Pointer to the mailbox instance.

listitem.para: Perform input parameter validation on InstancePtr,if not NULL initialize the InstancePtr. Return XST_FAILURE if NULL.

briefdescription.para: This function computes SHA3-384 hash over the given data using xilsecure IPI.

parameterdescription.para: Address of the data to hash
Size of the data in bytes
Buffer (minimum 48 bytes, 64-byte aligned) to store hash

briefdescription.para: This function validates the Boot Header Hash Block certificate and authenticates it.

detaileddescription.para: The BH HB cert starts immediately after the Boot Header (at PdiAddr + SMAP_WD_PATTERN_SIZE + BH_SIZE). On success, MhOffset is set to the byte offset of the IHT.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to XLoader_ClientInstance
Base address of the PDI in memory
Output: byte offset from PdiAddr to the IHT

briefdescription.para: This function calculates hash and verifies hash of PLM & PMC CDO.

parameterdescription.para: Address where authenticated PDI is present
Address where boot header is present

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS on success and error code on failure

memberdef.argsstring: (XLoader_ClientInstance *InstancePtr, const u64 PdiAddr, const u64 MhOffset, u32 PrtnStartIdx, const u32 PdiType)
memberdef.name: XLoader_ValidateMhAndPrtnAuth

briefdescription.para: This function validates the MetaHeader (IHT) Hash Block cert and authenticates all partitions starting from PrtnStartIdx.

para.verbatim: For each partition, a SHA3 hash of the partition data is computed and compared against the corresponding entry in the IHT Hash Block.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to XLoader_ClientInstance
Base address of the PDI in memory
Byte offset from PdiAddr to the IHT
Partition index to start from (1 for full PDI, 0 for partial PDI)
Type of PDI (full or partial) to determine hash block indexing

memberdef.argsstring: (u64 PdiAddr, const XilLoader_PrtnHdr *PrtnHdr, u64 PrtnIdx, const u32 PdiType)
memberdef.name: XLoader_VerifyPrtnAuth

briefdescription.para: This function calculates hash and verifies hash of each partition.

parameterdescription.para: Address where authenticated PDI is present
Pointer to partition header information
Partition index in the hash block
Type of PDI (full or partial) to determine hash block indexing

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS on success and error code on failure

briefdescription.para: This function fills payload and sends IPI request for verifying signature for the provided hash.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to XLoader_ClientInstance
Address where hash block sign parameters are present
Address where hash block instance is present

briefdescription.para: This function sends IPI request to configure jtag status.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the client instance.
To enable / disable jtag.

listitem.para: Perform input parameters validation. Return XST_FAILURE if input parameters are invalid
Send an IPI request to the PLM by using the XLoader_ConfigureJtagState CDO command Wait for IPI response from PLM with a timeout.
If the timeout exceeds then error is returned otherwise it returns the status of the IPI response.
Perform input parameters validation. Return XST_FAILURE if input parameters are invalid
Send an IPI request to the PLM by using the XLoader_ConfigureJtagState CDO command Wait for IPI response from PLM with a timeout.
If the timeout exceeds then error is returned otherwise it returns the status of the IPI response.

briefdescription.para: This function sends IPI request to read DDR crypto performance counters.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the client instance.
DDR device id.
To read DDR crypto counters.

listitem.para: Perform input parameters validation. Return XST_FAILURE if input parameters are invalid
Send an IPI request to the PLM by using the XLoader_ReadDdrCryptoPerfCounters CDO command Wait for IPI response from PLM with a timeout.
If the timeout exceeds then error is returned otherwise it returns the status of the IPI response.
Perform input parameters validation. Return XST_FAILURE if input parameters are invalid
Send an IPI request to the PLM by using the XLoader_ReadDdrCryptoPerfCounters CDO command Wait for IPI response from PLM with a timeout.
If the timeout exceeds then error is returned otherwise it returns the status of the IPI response.

memberdef.argsstring: (XLoader_ClientInstance *InstancePtr, const u64 PdiAddr, const u32 PdiType)
memberdef.name: XLoader_ValidatePdiAuth

briefdescription.para: This function sends IPI request to validate authenticated PDI based on PDI type.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to XLoader_ClientInstance
Address where authenticated PDI is present
Value to indicate full or partial PDI

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS on success and error code on failure

simplesect.para: This function has external linkage and is declared in xloader_plat_client.h for use by application code.

parameterdescription.para: - Pointer to XLoader_ClientInstance
- Address where authenticated PDI is present
- Value to indicate Full or Partial PDI

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS on success and error code on failure

inbodydescription.para: For full PDI Partition 0 is PLM. Hence Idx starts from 1 for PLM loadable partitions

memberdef.argsstring: (XLoader_ClientInstance *InstancePtr, u64 PrtnAddr, u32 PrtnLen, u32 PrtnIdx, u64 ACAddr, XilPdi_HashTblInfo *HashTblInfo)
memberdef.name: XLoader_VerifyPrtnAuth

briefdescription.para: This function calculates hash and verifies signature for each partition.

parameterdescription.para: - Pointer to XLoader_ClientInstance
- Address where partition is present
- Length of partition
- Index of the partition
- Address where Authentication Certificate of partition is present
- Pointer to Hash Table Information

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS on success and error code on failure

memberdef.argsstring: (XLoader_ClientInstance *InstancePtr, u64 HashAddr, u64 ACAddr, u32 SignatureSelect)
memberdef.name: XLoader_VerifyDataAuth

briefdescription.para: This function fills payload and sends IPI request for verifying signature for the provided hash.

parameterdescription.para: - Pointer to XLoader_ClientInstance
- Address where hash is present
- Address where authentication certificate is present

- To select signature in authentication certificate
TRUE - Header signature
FALSE - Image signature

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS on success and error code on failure

briefdescription.para: This function sends IPI request to validate Boot Header, PLM and PMC CDO authentication.

parameterdescription.para: - Pointer to XLoader_ClientInstance
- Address where authenticated PDI is present
- Pointer to Meta Header Offset

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS on success and error code on failure

memberdef.argsstring: (XLoader_ClientInstance *InstancePtr, const u64 PdiAddr, const u64 MhOffset, const u32 PrtnStartIdx)
memberdef.name: XLoader_ValidateMhAndPrtnAuth

briefdescription.para: This function sends IPI request to validate Meta Header and partition authentication.

parameterdescription.para: - Pointer to XLoader_ClientInstance
- Address where authenticated PDI is present
- Offset where meta header is present
- Partition start offset i.e. 0 for PPDI and 1 for Full PDI

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS on success and error code on failure

briefdescription.para: This function calculates hash and verifies signature for each partition.

parameterdescription.para: - Pointer to XLoader_ClientInstance
- Address where authenticated PDI is present
- Address where bootheader is present

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS on success and error code on failure

briefdescription.para: This function search offset of optional data address.

parameterdescription.para: is start address of IHT optional data
is end address of IHT optional data
is to identify type of data in data structure

listitem.para: Offset on getting successful optional data offset address for given data Id.

briefdescription.para: This function checks whether Partition hash is present or not and compares the claculated hash with hash which is present in IHT Optional data for the respective partitions.

parameterdescription.para: is Address fo the calculated Hash
is pointer to Hash table info
is index of partition hash in IHT optional data

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS on success error code on failure

briefdescription.para: This function checks whether Authentication optimization is enabled or not.

parameterdescription.para: is start address of IHT optional data
is size of IHT optional data
is pointer to XilPdi_HashTblInfo

listitem.para:
XST_SUCCESS On Success
XST_FAILURE On Failure

briefdescription.para: Shift value to get higher 32 bit address.
Mask for MSB bit.
Row field start bit position.
Block type field start bit position.
Mask for row.
Mask for block type.
Mask for frame address.
Size of SMAP width pattern.
Size of bootheader.
Mask for signed image in BH.
SHA3-384 hash length.
Word length in bytes.
Shift to convert word in bytes.
Size of Image Header Table in bytes.
Maximum number of partitions in the IHT.
Size of Image Header in bytes.
Size of Partition Header Table in bytes.
0th for Boot Header Hash
1st for PLM
2nd for PMC Data
3rd for Hash Block 1
0th for Meta Header
Size of SMAP width pattern.
Size of bootheader without padding.
Size of bootheader.
Size of Image Header Table.
Mask for signed image in bootheader.
RSA 4096 key size.
Size of Secondary Public Key(in bytes) in Authentication Certificate.
Size of Primary Public Key(in bytes) in Authentication Certificate.
Size of SPK signature(in bytes) in Authentication Certificate.
Size of Bootheader signature(in bytes) in Authentication Certificate.
Size of Partition signature(in bytes) in Authentication Certificate.
Size of Authentication header(in bytes) in Authentication Certificate.
Size of User Data(in bytes) in Authentication Certificate.

memberdef.name: XLOADER_AUTH_CERT_MIN_SIZE
memberdef.initializer: (XLOADER_AUTH_HEADER_SIZE \ + XLOADER_AUTH_CERT_USER_DATA \ + XLOADER_PPK_SIZE \ + XLOADER_SPK_SIZE \ + XLOADER_SPK_SIG_SIZE \ + 8U \ + XLOADER_BHDR_SIG_SIZE \ + XLOADER_PARTITION_SIG_SIZE)

briefdescription.para: Minimum Size of Authentication Certificate(in bytes)
Max number of partitions.
Length of SHA3 Hash in bytes.
Length of word in bytes.
Shift to convert word in bytes.
Size of partition in bytes.
Optional data id mask.
Optional data length mask.
shift value to extract optional data length
Optional data length offset.
Default optional data length.
Optional data id for hash table.
